prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为75801名、66258名、61255名、69482名、66345名，整体呈波动走势；2023年达到近年最高点61255名后2024年回落 至69482名，2025年回升至66345名，近两年在66000-69500区间内波动，2025年基准位次约66345名；该校在浙江省招生计划从2021年20人逐步扩至2022年29人、 2023-2025年稳定在32人；2026年计划增至34人，较2025年扩招2人（+6.25%），小幅扩招使录取位次数字略有增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）克拉玛依 校区为211工程、双一流建设高校，共享中国石油大学（北京）的办学层次与品牌效应；软科中国大学排名中中国石油大学（北京）主校2026年约第62名，学校层次较好，对中等 分数段考生有一定吸引力；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均未出现显著信号，整体舆情平稳，未见明显负面或正面事件影响报考心理；该校以石油石化特色见长，石油工程、油气储运工程、化学工程与工艺等为传统优势专业，在行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热度持续偏高，会计/财务/审计推荐度上升，石油工程等传统工科热度一般；浙江省2026年高考考生总数约400000人，较2025年2 90790人大幅增加约37.6%，整体竞争显著加剧；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距浙江省较远，地域偏好对浙江考生报考意愿有一定抑 制作用，但211层次和石油行业特色仍吸引特定考生群体。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次66345名、2026年扩招2人使供需弹性位次上移至68833名、浙江省考生总数大幅增 加约37.6%进一步加剧竞争、以及地理位置偏远对报考热度的部分抵消作用，预测2026年最低录取位次约69033名，区间68533-69533名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 会计学（克拉玛依校区）
- 金融学（克拉玛依校区）
- 经济学（克拉玛依校区）
- 石油工程（克拉玛依校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化（克拉玛依校区）
- 计算机类（克拉玛依校区，含软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化（克拉玛依校区）
- 能源化学工程（克拉玛依校区）
- 油气储运工程（克拉玛依校区）
- 新能源科学与工程（克拉玛依校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数学与应用数学（克拉玛依校区）
- 过程装备与控制工程（克拉玛依校区）
- 环境工程（克拉玛依校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间68533-69533名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业可冲刺（会计学、金融学等热门专业位次要求较高），三档专业作为保底选择。石油工程、油气储 运工程等石油特色专业虽热度一般，但行业对口就业优势明显，适合有明确职业规划的考生。2026年新增大数据管理与应用、人工智能、能源与动力工程等专业，值得关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were 75,801, 66,258, 61,255, 69,482, and 66,345 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend; after reaching a recent high of 61,255 in 2023, it dropped to 69,482 in 2024, then rebounded to 66,345 in 2025, fluctuating within the 66,000-69,500 range in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 66,345 in 2025; the enrollment plan in Zhejiang gradually expanded from 20 students in 2021 to 29 in 2022, and stabilized at 32 from 2023 to 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 34 students, an increase of 2 students (+6.25%) compared to 2025, and the slight expansion will cause the admission ranking number to increase slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) Karamay Campus is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, sharing the school level and brand effect of China University of Petroleum (Beijing); in the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus of China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is approximately 62nd in 2026, with a good school level that attracts some middle-score candidates; the school has no significant signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, with overall public opinion stable and no obvious negative or positive events affecting application psychology; the school is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, chemical engineering and technology as traditional advantageous majors, with high recognition in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., continue to have high social popularity, accounting/finance/auditing recommendations are rising, while traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering have average popularity; the total number of Zhejiang 2026 college entrance examination candidates is approximately 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 290,790 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; the school is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Zhejiang Province, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Zhejiang candidates' willingness to apply, but the 211 level and petroleum industry characteristics still attract specific candidate groups.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 66,345, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students shifting the supply-demand elastic ranking to 68,833, the significant increase of about 37.6% in Zhejiang candidate numbers further intensifying competition, and the partial offsetting effect of remote geographical location on application popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 69,033, with a range of 68,533-69,533.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Accounting (Karamay Campus)
- Finance (Karamay Campus)
- Economics (Karamay Campus)
- Petroleum Engineering (Karamay Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Karamay Campus)
- Computer Science (Karamay Campus, including Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Karamay Campus)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (Karamay Campus)
- Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering (Karamay Campus)
- New Energy Science and Engineering (Karamay Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Karamay Campus)
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering (Karamay Campus)
- Environmental Engineering (Karamay Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 68,533-69,533, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be attempted (accounting, finance, etc., have higher ranking requirements), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, and other petroleum-specific majors, although average in popularity, have clear industry-targeted employment advantages, suitable for candidates with clear career plans. New majors added in 2026 include Big Data Management and Application, Artificial Intelligence, and Energy and Power Engineering, which are worth attention.

_translation.university_name_en: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) Karamay Campus
